reasoning: Initial observation shows V = 20.0 when I = 2.0 and R = 10.0. Increasing R might help determine if V is directly proportional to R.
Doubling R from 10 to 20 doubled V from 20 to 40, suggesting V is directly proportional to R. Now, I will check if V is also dependent on I.
Doubling I from 2 to 3 increased V from 40 to 60 while keeping R constant. This suggests V is directly proportional to both I and R.
